Script.name: Setup
Run ALs
Wait for ALs to stop
DumpWorkEntry
Script.parameter: // Dump the work entry task.dumpEntry(work);

Script.name: Init
Script.parameter: maxLoops = 200; cnt = 0

Branch.name: More to do

Hook.name: prolog0
Hook.Name: prolog0

Hook.name: default_fail
Hook.Name: default_fail
Hook.Script: task.logmsg("...stopping test due to:\n" + error); task.shutdown()

Hook.name: lookup_nomatch
Hook.Name: lookup_nomatch

Hook.name: addonly_ok
Hook.Name: addonly_ok
Hook.Script: task.logmsg("Added:\n" + conn) waitingFor("the add to be processed")

Hook.name: after_getnext
Hook.Name: after_getnext

Hook.name: after_delete
Hook.Name: after_delete
Hook.Script: task.logmsg("ACI deleted: " + conn); //waitingFor("the delete to be processed")

Hook.name: prolog0
Hook.Name: prolog0

Component.name: Find lifecyclerules for CATEGORY_TYPE and Account
Find lifecyclerules and delete those tagged with TDI
Delete LifecycleRule with TDI in description

Hook.name: after_add
Hook.Name: after_add
Hook.Script: task.logmsg("Added:\n" + conn) waitingFor("the add to be processed")

Loop.name: Find lifecyclerules for CATEGORY_TYPE and Account

Connector.name: Find lifecyclerules for CATEGORY_TYPE and Account

Branch.name: Find lifecyclerules for CATEGORY_TYPE and Account

Hook.name: after_modify
Hook.Name: after_modify
Hook.Script: task.logmsg("Item updated: " + conn); waitingFor("for the update to be processed")

Hook.name: before_execute
Hook.Name: before_execute

Loop.name: Find lifecyclerules and delete those tagged with TDI

Connector.name: Find lifecyclerules and delete those tagged with TDI

Branch.name: Find lifecyclerules and delete those tagged with TDI
Look for TDI in description

Connector.name: Delete LifecycleRule with TDI in description

Hook.name: after_delete
Hook.Name: after_delete
Hook.Script: task.logmsg("LifecycleRule deleted: " + conn.name + " " + conn.description); //waitingFor("the delete to be processed")

Hook.name: prolog0
Hook.Name: prolog0

Component.name: Add Doe for creating ACIs later

Script.name: Functions
Script.parameter: false

Hook.name: after_add
Hook.Name: after_add
Hook.Script: task.logmsg("Added:\n" + conn) waitingFor("the add to be processed")

Hook.name: default_fail
Hook.Name: default_fail
Hook.Script: task.logmsg("...stopping test due to:\n" + error); task.shutdown()

Hook.name: after_modify
Hook.Name: after_modify
Hook.Script: task.logmsg("Modification successful: " + conn); waitingFor("the modify request to be processed")

Hook.name: after_delete
Hook.Name: after_delete
Hook.Script: task.logmsg("Successfully deleted Doe: " + work.cn) //waitingFor("the delete request to be processed")

Connector.name: Add Doe for creating ACIs later

Hook.name: after_add
Hook.Name: after_add
Hook.Script: task.logmsg("Added:\n" + conn) waitingFor("the add to be processed")

Hook.name: prolog0
Hook.Name: prolog0

Script.name: Set which type of test
Script.parameter: testingFormScript = false; // Which Branch to execute (Form or Connector)

Script.name: SpoofLib
Form Init Script
Test Form Event Script
Script.parameter: true

Script.name: Connector Script
Script.parameter: true

Script.name: Test Connector functions

name="scriptLabel">Fetch</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">string</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="api_key_location"> <ModTime>1773148862697</ModTime> <Values> <ListItem>Header</ListItem> <ListItem>Query String Parameter</ListItem> </Values> <parameter name="description">Specifies where the API key is sent with the request (for example, as an HTTP header or query parameter)</parameter> <parameter name="label">API Key Location</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">droplist</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="api_key_name"> <ModTime>1772729914895</ModTime> <parameter name="description">The header or query parameter name used to send the API key with each request (e.g., x-api-key). </parameter> <parameter name="label">API Key Name</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="api_key_value"> <ModTime>1771321829930</ModTime> <parameter name="label">API Key Value</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="audience"> <ModTime>1771336440141</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Optional and depends on the REST service</parameter> <parameter name="label">Audience / Resource</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="auth_method"> <ModTime>1773148862635</ModTime> <Values> <ListItem>None</ListItem> <ListItem>Basic</ListItem> <ListItem>Bearer Token</ListItem> <ListItem>API Key</ListItem> <ListItem>OAuth 2.0</ListItem> <ListItem>ITIM/IGI</ListItem> <ListItem>Custom</ListItem> </Values> <parameter name="Required">true</parameter> <parameter name="description">Authentication method used by the API.</parameter> <parameter name="label">Auth Type</parameter> <parameter name="script">setauth_method</parameter> <parameter name="scriptLabel">Set</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">droplist</parameter> name="basic_username"> <ModTime>1771338791177</ModTime> <parameter name="label">Username</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="bearer_token"> <ModTime>1771336964387</ModTime> <parameter <parameter name="description">Enable to have the solution cache the OpenAPI Schema using the Server JVM</parameter> <parameter name="label">Cache Schema</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">boolean</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="client_id"> <ModTime>1771332974295</ModTime> <parameter name="label">Client ID</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="client_key_password"> <ModTime>1771333000289</ModTime> <parameter name="label">Client Key Password</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">password</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="client_secret"> <ModTime>1771333024652</ModTime> <parameter name="label">Client Secret</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">password</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="contextRoot"> <parameter name="syntax">dropedit</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="custom_script"> <ModTime>1772732296197</ModTime> <parameter name="description">The Javascript used to authenticate this client</parameter> <parameter name="label">Script</parameter> <parameter name="script">testCustomScript</parameter> <parameter name="scriptLabel">Test</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">script</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="default_headers"> <ModTime>1771333374730</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Default headers to include in all requests. Format is key=value one per line.</parameter> <parameter name="label">Default Headers</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">textarea</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="default_querystrings"> <ModTime>1771333386014</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Default query strings to include on all requests. Format is key=value one per line.</parameter> <parameter name="label">Default Query Strings</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">textarea</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="includePrologs"> <parameter name="description">pro_desc</parameter> <parameter name="label">pro_label</parameter> <parameter name="script">selectGlobalProlog</parameter> <parameter name="scriptLabel">pro_script_label</parameter> <parameter name="scripthelp">pro_script_help</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">textarea</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="itim_csrf_header"> <parameter name="description">HTTP header name for CSRF token (default: CSRFToken)</parameter> <parameter name="label">CSRF Header Name</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="itim_login_endpoint"> <parameter name="description">Path for j_security_check authentication (default: /itim/j_security_check)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Login Endpoint</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="itim_me_endpoint"> <parameter name="description">Path to retrieve CSRF token and user info (default: /itim/rest/systemusers/me)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Current User Endpoint</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="itim_password"> <parameter name="description">ITIM/IGI password for j_security_check authentication</parameter> <parameter name="label">Password</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">password</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="itim_username"> <parameter name="description">ITIM/IGI username for j_security_check authentication</parameter> <parameter name="label">Username</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="keepGlobalState"> <parameter name="description">SCRIPT_CONN_KEEP_GLOBAL_STATE_DESC</parameter> <parameter name="label">SCRIPT_CONN_KEEP_GLOBAL_STATE_LABEL</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">boolean</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="log_level"> <ModTime>1771333516648</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Controls the detail level of the Connector's log output</parameter> <parameter name="label">Log Level</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="max_cache_age"> <ModTime>1771862993208</ModTime> <parameter name="description">The number of hours before refreshing the cache. Set to 0 to disable caching.</parameter> <parameter name="label">Max Cache Age</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="oauth2_auth_url"> <ModTime>1771339308184</ModTime> <parameter name="description">URL of the OAuth authorization endpoint where the user is redirected to log in and grant access</parameter> <parameter name="label">Authentication URL</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="oauth2_password"> <ModTime>1771574071477</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Credential to use for OAuth Password authentication</parameter> <parameter name="label">Password</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">password</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="oauth2_token_auth_method"> <ModTime>1773148862732</ModTime> <Values> <ListItem>none (public client)</ListItem> <ListItem>Client Secret Basic</ListItem> <ListItem>Client Secret Post</ListItem> <ListItem>Client Secret JWT</ListItem> <ListItem>Private Key JWT</ListItem> </Values> <parameter name="description">Specifies how the client authenticates to the token endpoint (for example, client_secret_basic or client_secret_post</parameter> <parameter name="label">Token Auth Method</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">droplist</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="oauth2_token_header_name"> <ModTime>1772731541365</ModTime> <parameter name="description">HTTP header used to send the access token (default "Authorization")</parameter> <parameter name="label">Token Header Name</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="oauth2_token_prefix"> <ModTime>1771336811756</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Text added before the access token in the Authorization header (for example, "Bearer")</parameter> <parameter name="label">Token Prefix</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="oauth2_token_url"> <ModTime>1771337628674</ModTime> <parameter name="description">OAuth 2.0 token endpoint used to obtain or refresh an access token</parameter> <parameter name="label">Token URL</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="oauth2_username"> <ModTime>1771335911022</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Credential to use for OAuth Password authentication</parameter> <parameter name="label">Username</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="path"> <ModTime>1771850261885</ModTime> <parameter name="description">API endpoint path relative to base URL (e.g., /users or /api/v1/data).</parameter> <parameter name="label">Endpoint Path</parameter> <parameter name="script">fetchEndpoints</parameter> <parameter name="scriptLabel">Select</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">dropedit</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="redirect_uri"> <ModTime>1771334149628</ModTime> <parameter name="description">URL to the endpoint that issues access tokens</parameter> <parameter name="label">Redirect URL</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="retry_enabled"> <ModTime>1771419210174</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Enables retry for requests that fail</parameter> <parameter name="label">Retry</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">boolean</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="retry_max"> <ModTime>1771419266280</ModTime> <parameter name="description">The maximum number of retries attempted before failing (default 1)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Max Retries</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="retry_status_codes"> <ModTime>1771419346798</ModTime> <parameter name="description">HTTP Status Codes for responses that will result in retry of the request (one per line)</parameter> <parameter name="label">Status Codes for Retry</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">textarea</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="schema"> <ModTime>1772287776092</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Path to the OpenAPI schema. </parameter> <parameter name="label">OpenAPI Schema Path</parameter> <parameter name="script">fetchSchemaEveryTime</parameter> <parameter name="scriptLabel">Refresh</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="scope"> <ModTime>1773148862707</ModTime> <Values> <ListItem>OAuth2 Client Credentials</ListItem> <ListItem>OAuth2 Authorization Code</ListItem> <ListItem>OAuth2 Password</ListItem> </Values> <parameter name="description">Type of OAuth 2.0 strategy to use</parameter> <parameter name="label">Scope</parameter> <parameter name="script">selectScope</parameter> <parameter name="scriptLabel">Select</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">droplist</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="tls_verify"> <ModTime>1771321649792</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Validates the server's TLS certificate against the configured truststore</parameter> <parameter name="label">Verify Server Certificate</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">boolean</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="token_header_name"> <ModTime>1771334927458</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Name of the header item for passing the token</parameter> <parameter name="label">Token Header Name</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="token_prefix"> <ModTime>1771339640949</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Text added before the access token in the Authorization header (for example, "Bearer")</parameter> <parameter name="label">Token Prefix</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="token_url"> <ModTime>1771333812724</ModTime> <parameter name="label">Token URL</parameter> </FormItem> <FormItem name="url"> <ModTime>1772715049354</ModTime> <parameter name="Required">true</parameter> <parameter name="description">REST API base URL. Then select and configure authentication method below.</parameter> <parameter name="label">Host URL</parameter> <parameter name="script"/> <parameter name="scriptLabel"/> </FormItem> <FormItem name="use_pkce"> <ModTime>1771335773112</ModTime> <parameter name="description">Uses Proof Key for Code Exchange (PKCE) to prevent interception of the authorization code</parameter> <parameter name="label">Use PKCE</parameter> <parameter name="syntax">boolean</parameter> </FormItem> <FormSection name="API Key"> <ModTime>1771762688896</ModTime> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>api_key_name</ListItem> <ListItem>api_key_value</ListItem> <ListItem>api_key_location</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="initiallyExpanded">false</parameter> <parameter name="title">API KEY</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="Advanced"> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.userComment</ListItem> <ListItem>$GLOBAL.script</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="initiallyExpanded">false</parameter> <parameter name="title">Advanced</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="Basic"> <ModTime>1771762659096</ModTime> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>basic_username</ListItem> <ListItem>basic_password</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="initiallyExpanded">false</parameter> <parameter name="title">BASIC AUTHENTICATION</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="BearerToken"> <ModTime>1771762698408</ModTime> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>bearer_token</ListItem> <ListItem>token_header_name</ListItem> <ListItem>token_prefix</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="initiallyExpanded">false</parameter> <parameter name="title">BEARER TOKEN</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="Common Settings"> <ModTime>1771419423591</ModTime> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>default_headers</ListItem> <ListItem>default_querystrings</ListItem> <ListItem>tls_verify</ListItem> <ListItem>retry_enabled</ListItem> <ListItem>retry_max</ListItem> <ListItem>retry_status_codes</ListItem> <ListItem>log_level</ListItem> <ListItem>max_cache_age</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="initiallyExpanded">false</parameter> <parameter name="title">Common Settings</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="Custom Authentication"> <ModTime>1771845824246</ModTime> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>custom_script</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="initiallyExpanded">false</parameter> <parameter name="title">Custom Authentication</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="General"> <ModTime>1771418997117</ModTime> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>url</ListItem> <ListItem>schema</ListItem> <ListItem>auth_method</ListItem> <ListItem>path</ListItem> <ListItem>contextRoot</ListItem> <ListItem>action</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="initiallyExpanded">false</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="ITIM"> <ModTime>1771788781275</ModTime> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>itim_username</ListItem> <ListItem>itim_password</ListItem> <ListItem>itim_login_endpoint</ListItem> <ListItem>itim_me_endpoint</ListItem> <ListItem>itim_csrf_header</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="initiallyExpanded">false</parameter> <parameter name="title">ITIM/IGI AUTHENTICATION</parameter> </FormSection> <FormSection name="OAuth20"> <ModTime>1771762707063</ModTime> <FormSectionNames> <ListItem>scope</ListItem> <ListItem>client_id</ListItem> <ListItem>client_secret</ListItem> <ListItem>redirect_uri</ListItem> <ListItem>oauth2_auth_url</ListItem> <ListItem>oauth2_token_url</ListItem> <ListItem>oauth2_token_auth_method</ListItem> <ListItem>oauth2_token_header_name</ListItem> <ListItem>oauth2_token_prefix</ListItem> <ListItem>oauth2_username</ListItem> <ListItem>oauth2_password</ListItem> <ListItem>audience</ListItem> <ListItem>use_pkce</ListItem> <ListItem>client_key_password</ListItem> </FormSectionNames> <parameter name="initiallyExpanded">false</parameter> <parameter name="title">OAUTH 2.0</parameter> </FormSection> <parameter name="api_key_location">Header</parameter> <parameter name="auth_method">OAuth 2.0</parameter> <parameter name="client_id">444</parameter> <parameter encrypted="true" name="client_key_password">esa1pWpZwitJ5iQI7zr5wObqGMapZYakQarGhbXJAoENzecRXZNt2n9oFuI5GHG3yd2AeASZrqIMnsuOl9vL1sJ/Mj8PqDTJD6KOAXMwKhi0FODfTEgdhCD/9U+UsGo7piGWn6+JKNPePqJn0bPxbEn2SgUJAPlDe5o//crX+1w=</parameter> <parameter encrypted="true" name="client_secret">JSJ3kTyDh0GSg5LnBQCS3ECMMKobSJAxLJ0mxxM2cFX4MZDSC04gB2vfSBzRUNgf75MbqBKReQuB2rCPa5EhvxSHKjm7AxIhwYOwb1NP+sEAhe236U814DQgwpl4wpKfuAIhVmx8IvQkKG0F10C1as9d9s+bGB+E8giAT2Uzp0E=</parameter> <parameter name="formscript"><![CDATA[// 20250104 1959 Initial // ... // 20260130 1436 Removed main.logmsg() debug messages // 20260202 1413 Added Current User Path to the Connection tab and RESTCLIENT constructor // 202650215 1730 Removed the meURL parameter, hardcoded now for ITIM // 202650218 1333 Moved the path param above context root in the Form // 202650220 1530 Updated to use new multi-auth RESTCLIENT class with proper parameter mapping // 20260220 1458 Redone by Claude // 20260222 1830 Saved by Chat // 20260223 1052 _test AL wont debug, so I copied all components to new AL, and now it does // 20260223 1632 WORKING AGAIN. THANK YOU CHAT!!! // 20260229 1421 Trying for Basic Auth now // 20260229 1535 Now for API Key // 20260229 2051 Bearer Token working...? // 20260301 1000 Bearer Token working! // 20260310 1436 Fixed the issue when there are no context roots // // GLOBAL VARIABLES // var __schema = null; var __initialized = false; var __arrayList = new java.util.ArrayList(); var __http = null;
// // FUNCTIONS //
__minMem = 999999999; __startMem = 0; __memHistory = []; function checkMemory() { var freeMem = java.lang.Runtime.getRuntime().freeMemory(); var totalMem = java.lang.Runtime.getRuntime().totalMemory(); var maxMem = java.lang.Runtime.getRuntime().maxMemory(); }
function prettyTime(ms) { if (ms == null || isNaN(ms)) return "0 seconds";
ms = parseInt(ms, 10);
var totalSeconds = Math.floor(ms / 1000);
var days = Math.floor(totalSeconds / 86400); totalSeconds = totalSeconds % 86400;
var hours = Math.floor(totalSeconds / 3600); totalSeconds = totalSeconds % 3600;
var minutes = Math.floor(totalSeconds / 60); var seconds = totalSeconds % 60;
var parts = [];
if (days > 0) parts.push(days + " day" + (days !== 1 ? "s" : "")); if (hours > 0) parts.push(hours + " hour" + (hours !== 1 ? "s" : "")); if (minutes > 0) parts.push(minutes + " minute" + (minutes !== 1 ? "s" : "")); if (seconds > 0 || parts.length === 0) parts.push(seconds + " second" + (seconds !== 1 ? "s" : ""));
return parts.join(" "); }
function prettyMem(bytes) { if (bytes == null || isNaN(bytes)) return "0 B"; bytes = parseInt(bytes, 10);
var KB = 1024; var MB = KB * 1024; var GB = MB * 1024;
if (bytes >= GB) { return (bytes / GB).toFixed(2) + " GB"; } if (bytes >= MB) { return (bytes / MB).toFixed(2) + " MB"; } if (bytes >= KB) { return (bytes / KB).toFixed(2) + " KB"; } return bytes + " B"; }
function debug() { return false; // return form.getControl("debug").getText(); }
function alert(msg) { //main.logmsg(msg); //java.lang.System.out.println(msg); }
function alertObject(objName, obj) { alert("alertObj(" + objName + ", " + toJson(obj)); var arr = [objName + ": " + typeof (obj) + " ----------\n"]; for (var child in obj) { arr.push(" " + child + "\n"); } alert(arr.toString()); }
function normalizeAuthMethod(v) { // 0 None, 1 Basic, 2 Bearer Token, 3 API Key, 4 OAuth2, 5 ITIM/IGI, 6 Custom if (v == null) return 0;
// If already a number-ish, accept it try { var n = system.toInt(String(v)); if (n >= 0 && n <= 6) return n; } catch (e) { }
var s = String(v).toLowerCase().trim(); if (s === "" || s === "none") return 0; if (s.indexOf("basic") >= 0) return 1; if (s.indexOf("bearer") >= 0) return 2; if (s.indexOf("api") >= 0 && s.indexOf("key") >= 0) return 3; if (s.indexOf("oauth") >= 0) return 4; if (s.indexOf("itim") >= 0 || s.indexOf("igi") >= 0) return 5; if (s.indexOf("custom") >= 0) return 6; return 0; }
// @@FIX: Updated initialize() to use new RESTCLIENT with proper auth parameters // Builds the args object dynamically based on selected auth_method function initialize() { if (__initialized) return; __initialized = true;
eval(system.getScriptText("RESTCLIENT class")); // Load HTTP Client class
// @@FIX: Build constructor args based on auth_method selection var args = { baseUrl: form.getControl("url").getText(), contextRoot: form.getControl("contextRoot").getText() || "/itim/rest", auth_method: form.getControl("auth_method").getText(), // "none", "basic" debug: debug() // true => debug output };
// @@FIX: Add auth-specific parameters based on selected method var authMethodIndex = normalizeAuthMethod(args.auth_method);
if (authMethodIndex === 1) { // Basic Auth args.basic_username = form.getControl("basic_username").getText(); args.basic_password = form.getControl("basic_password").getText();
} else if (authMethodIndex === 2) { // API Key args.api_key_value = form.getControl("api_key_value").getText(); args.api_key_name = form.getControl("api_key_name").getText(); args.api_key_location = form.getControl("api_key_location").getText();
} else if (authMethodIndex === 3) { // Bearer Token args.bearer_token = form.getControl("bearer_token").getText(); args.token_header_name = form.getControl("token_header_name").getText(); args.token_prefix = form.getControl("token_prefix").getText();
} else if (authMethodIndex === 4) { // OAuth2 // @@FIX: Add all OAuth2 parameters from the form args.oauth2_token_url = form.getControl("oauth2_token_url").getText(); args.oauth2_auth_url = form.getControl("oauth2_auth_url").getText(); args.client_id = form.getControl("client_id").getText(); args.client_secret = form.getControl("client_secret").getText(); args.scope = form.getControl("scope").getText(); args.audience = form.getControl("audience").getText(); args.redirect_uri = form.getControl("redirect_uri").getText(); args.use_pkce = form.getControl("use_pkce").getSelection(); // checkbox args.oauth2_username = form.getControl("oauth2_username").getText(); args.oauth2_password = form.getControl("oauth2_password").getText(); args.oauth2_token_auth_method = form.getControl("oauth2_token_auth_method").getText(); args.oauth2_token_header_name = form.getControl("oauth2_token_header_name").getText(); args.oauth2_token_prefix = form.getControl("oauth2_token_prefix").getText(); args.client_key_password = form.getControl("client_key_password").getText(); } else if (authMethodIndex == 5) { // ITIM/IGI args.itim_username = form.getControl("itim_username").getText(); args.itim_password = form.getControl("itim_password").getText(); args.itim_login_endpoint = form.getControl("itim_login_endpoint").getText(); args.itim_me_endpoint = form.getControl("itim_me_endpoint").getText(); args.itim_csrf_header = form.getControl("itim_csrf_header").getText(); } else if (authMethodIndex == 6) { // Custom args.custom_script = form.getControl("custom_script").getText(); } // authMethodIndex === 0 (none) or 5 (custom) don't need additional parameters
// Create the HTTP client with appropriate auth configuration __http = new RESTCLIENT(args);
fetchSchema(); }
// Wrap each REST request in a Standby signal function makeRequest(args) { var reply = null; var target = null;
// Show a wait cursor while the Connector initializes form.setWaitCursor();
try { reply = __http.makeRequest(args); } catch (ex) { __schema = null; throw "MakeRequest from " + (args.where || "?") + "\n" + ex; } finally { // Restore the normal cursor form.setNormalCursor(); }
return reply; }
// Returns the schema each time it is called function fetchSchemaEveryTime() { __schema = null;
return fetchSchema(); }
// Return the openAPI schema function fetchSchema() { if (__schema) return __schema;
initialize();
try { var replyEntry = makeRequest({ verb: "GET", expectedReturnType: "entry", url: form.getControl("schema").getText(), ctype: "application/json", where: "fetchSchema()" }); } catch (ex) { var msg = "fetchSchema() failed with error: " + ex; alert(msg); throw msg; }
if (replyEntry == null) throw "Unable to request openAPI schema";
// Load the SCHEMA class eval(system.getScriptText("SCHEMA class")); // Load SCHEMA handling class
__schema = new SCHEMA(replyEntry.getString("http.bodyAsString"), "JSON");
return __schema; }
// Update the dropdown with paths function fetchEndpoints() { alert("---> fetchEndpoints");
initialize();
path = "paths";
updateDropdown("path", [path], "Cannot fetch actions for selected Endpoint");
//fetchActions(); }
// Once a path is selected, update the other dropdowns function selectEndpoint() { initialize();
alert("---> setEndpoint");
var path = form.getControl("path").getText();
var endpointDetails = __schema.getChildren(["paths", path]);
if (!endpointDetails) { form.alert("The Endpoint Path selected must be defined in the OpenAPI schema. Use the Fetch button to retrieve the full list."); return; }
fetchActions(); }
// Return the action based on the mode setting function modeBasedAction() { var mode = config.getParent().getMode(); switch (mode.toLowerCase()) { case "iterator": return "GET"; case "update": return "POST"; case "lookup": return "GET"; case "delete": return "DELETE"; case "addonly": return "POST"; } }
function fetchServers(selectedPath) { initialize();
alert(">> fetchServers for " + selectedPath);
selectedPath = selectedPath;
updateDropdown("contextRoot", ["paths", selectedPath, "servers"], "Cannot fetch servers for selected Endpoint"); }
// Update the dropdown with operations for the selected path function fetchActions() { initialize();
var selectedPath = form.getControl("path").getText();
alert("fetchActions() for " + selectedPath);
var endpointDetails = __schema.getChildren(["paths", selectedPath]); if (endpointDetails == null) { form.alert("The Endpoint Path set must be defined in the OpenAPI schema."); return; }
updateModes(selectedPath, "Cannot fetch HTTP verbs for the specified Path: " + selectedPath);
fetchServers(selectedPath); }
// Fetch the parameters (with descriptions) and populate the text box - appending to what is already there function fetchParameters() { initialize();
var params = __schema.getParameters(form.getControl("path").getText(), modeBasedAction());
updateTextBox("parameters", params); }
__hashMap = new java.util.HashMap(); function updateModes(selectedPath, errorMsg) { initialize();
var verbs = __schema.getChildren(["paths", selectedPath]);
if (!verbs) { form.alert("Endpoint Path parameter must be set before modes can be determined"); return; }
if (__schema == null) return;
// We have to go through all endpoints to see if there are any that match the selected one, but include the endpoint UID and that support PUT or DELETE var allVerbs = {}; var endpointPath = __schema.endpointPathIterator.getFirst(selectedPath); while (endpointPath) { if (endpointPath.equalsIgnoreCase(selectedPath) || (endpointPath.startsWith(selectedPath + "/{") && endpointPath.endsWith("}"))) { var verbs = __schema.getChildren(["paths", endpointPath]); for (verb in verbs) { var verbStr = verb.getName(); switch (verbStr) { case "get": allVerbs.get = true; break; case "put": allVerbs.modify = true; break; case "post": allVerbs.add = true; break; case "delete": allVerbs.del = true; break; } } }
endpointPath = __schema.endpointPathIterator.getNext(); }
var modes = __hashMap; modes.clear();
if (allVerbs.del) { modes.put("Delete", true); } if (allVerbs.get && allVerbs.modify && allVerbs.add) { modes.put("Update", true); } if (allVerbs.add) { modes.put("AddOnly", true); } if (allVerbs.get) { modes.put("Iterator", true); modes.put("Lookup", true); }
var modesSupported = modes.keySet().toArray().toString(", ");
alert("----> Supported modes for this path are: " + modesSupported);
form.getControl("action").setText(modesSupported); }
// Updating a textbox control function updateTextBox(controlName, paramsArray) { // First get the existing value and parse it (if possible) var oldValue = form.getControl(controlName).getText().trim(); var useParams = {};
// Go through the passed parameters and set those that are not already set for (var i = 0; i < paramsArray.length; i++) { var param = paramsArray[i]; if (param["in"] != "path" && param.name.indexOf("CSRFToken") < 0) { // Add to the list if not something for the path itself useParams[param.name] = system.splitString(param.description, ".")[0] + (system.splitString(param.description, ".")[1]); } }
// Parse the old text value into individual parameter settings and put in an Entry if (oldValue) { var lines = system.splitString(oldValue, "\n"); for (var line in lines) { var parts = system.splitString(line, "="); if (parts.length > 1) { // Overwrite any discovered parameters with previously set values useParams[parts[0].trim()] = parts[1].trim(); } } }
// Get the useParams property names (param names) and sort them __arrayList.clear(); for (var propName in useParams) { alert(" Adding " + propName); __arrayList.add(propName); }
paramNames = __arrayList.toArray(); java.util.Arrays.sort(paramNames); alert(" ParamNames: " + paramNames.length + " item(s)");
var newParamText = ""; for (var i = 0; i < paramNames.length; i++) { var paramName = paramNames[i]; alert(" Getting " + paramName); newParamText += paramName + "=" + useParams[paramName] + "\n"; }
// Finally, update the control form.getControl(controlName).setText(newParamText); }
// Update dropdown based on API function updateDropdown(controlName, path, errorMsg) { var ndx; alert(">> updateDropdown: " + controlName + " path: " + path) try { initialize();
if (!path) { form.alert("updateDropdown() - Path parameter must be set"); return; }
var subtree = __schema.getChildren(path);
if (subtree == null) { if (controlName == "contextRoot") { return } // Otherwise it's an error path.shift(); form.alert("Invalid Endpoint Path: " + path.toString()); return; }
} catch (ex) { var msg = "Updating Dropdown " + controlName + " using path " + path + "Cannot get API schema\n" + errorMsg + "\n" + ex; alert(msg); throw msg; }
combo = form.getControl(controlName);
// Get the current value and set the selection point if it matches a path var currentValue = (combo.getText() || "").trim();
alert(">> current value: " + currentValue); // alert("Removing all from combo: " + controlName); combo.removeAll(); // Empty drop-down
// Now to sort these alphabetically __arrayList.clear(); for (var child in subtree) { // See if the sub-attribute has the same name, so this represents a JS Array // Fancy footwork for dealing with path > servers, with an array of servers if (child.getName() == path[path.length - 1]) { // In which case, we add its child __arrayList.add(child.getChildNodes()[0].getValue()); } else { __arrayList.add(child.getName()); } }
var sortedArray = __arrayList.toArray(); java.util.Arrays.sort(sortedArray);
for (ndx in sortedArray) { if (!(controlName == "path" // Remove Paths that end with /{item id} && ndx.indexOf("/{") > 0 && ndx.endsWith("}"))) { combo.add(ndx); } }
var pos = 0;
// But only if a value has been set at all if (currentValue != "") {
// If this value is not prepended with forward slash, then add it if (!currentValue.startsWith("/")) { currentValue = "/" + currentValue; }
var len = combo.getItemCount(); for (pos = 0; pos < len; pos++) { var val = combo.getItem(pos);
if (val.equalsIgnoreCase(currentValue) || val.toLowerCase() > currentValue.toLowerCase()) { break; // Found a match } } }
pos = (pos < sortedArray.length) ? pos : 0; combo.select(pos);
//alert("UpdateDropdown set to position " + pos); }
// Empty out both Item and Object dropdowns function clearDropdowns() { form.getControl("path").removeAll(); }
// For debugging from inside function write(fname, str) { var bw = new java.io.BufferedWriter(new java.io.FileWriter("_Restify/Log_" + fname)); bw.write(str); bw.newLine(); bw.close(); }
// ----- // Stuff used to enable/disable parameters // 20250217 1035 Created
var __allControls = { basic_username: true, basic_password: true,
api_key_name: true, api_key_value: true, api_key_location: true,
bearer_token: true, token_header_name: true, token_prefix: true,
client_id: true, client_key_password: true, client_secret: true, audience: true, redirect_uri: true,
use_pkce: true,
oauth2_auth_url: true, oauth2_username: true, oauth2_password: true, oauth2_token_url: true, oauth2_token_prefix: true, oauth2_token_header_name: true, oauth2_token_auth_method: true, scope: true,
itim_login_endpoint: true, itim_username: true, itim_password: true, itim_login_endpoint: true, itim_me_endpoint: true, itim_csrf_header: true,
custom_script: true }
var __oauth2Parameters = [ { scope: true, audience: true, oauth2_token_url: true, client_id: true, client_secret: true, audience: true, oauth2_token_auth_method: true, oauth2_token_url: true, oauth2_token_header_name: true, oauth2_token_prefix: true }, { scope: true, audience: true, client_id: true, redirect_uri: true, use_pkce: true, oauth2_token_auth_method: true, oauth2_auth_url: true, oauth2_token_url: true, oauth2_token_header_name: true, oauth2_token_prefix: true }, { scope: true, audience: true, client_id: true, client_secret: true, oauth2_username: true, oauth2_password: true, oauth2_token_auth_method: true, oauth2_token_url: true, oauth2_token_header_name: true, oauth2_token_prefix: true } ]
var __sectionParameters = [ { // Nothing }, { basic_username: true, basic_password: true }, { bearer_token: true, token_header_name: true, token_prefix: true }, { api_key_name: true, api_key_value: true, api_key_location: true }, { scope: true }, { itim_login_endpoint: true, itim_username: true, itim_password: true, itim_login_endpoint: true, itim_me_endpoint: true, itim_csrf_header: true }, { custom_script: true } ]
// Set the auth strategy from the auth_method dropdown // and make only relevant params visible function setauth_method() { var control = form.getControl("auth_method"); var value = control.getText() || "";
if (!value) { value = "None" }
control.setText(value);
setAuthMethod() }
function setAuthMethod() { disableAllControls();
var method = form.getControl("auth_method").getSelectionIndex(); if (method < 0) { method = 0; } form.getControl("auth_method").select(method);
var enableSet = __sectionParameters[method]; for (var controlName in enableSet) { setVisible(controlName, true); } }
// Make the named parameter field visible function setVisible(controlName, enableIt) { if (typeof(enableIt) == "undefined") enableIt = true; var verb = enableIt ? "ENABLING" : "disabling"
//alert("---> " + verb + ": " + controlName);
var control = form.getControl(controlName); control.setVisible(enableIt);
return; // Skip the rest for now for (var child in children) { if (child.toString().startsWith("Label")) { //alert(">" + verb + " " + child.toString() + " <" + child.getText() + "> " + child.getClass()); child.setVisible(enableIt); } } }
// Make all parameters fields invisible (org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Control) function disableAllControls() { //alert("Form: " + form.getClass())
for (var controlName in __allControls) { var control = form.getControl(controlName); setVisible(controlName, false); } }
// Select the OAuth2 scope and enable the right parameters function selectScope() { // First disable all other parameters than 'scope' disableAllControls();
// Now turn the drop-down selection var scope = form.getControl("scope").getSelectionIndex(); if (scope < 0 || scope > 2) { scope = 0 } form.getControl("scope").select(scope); var enableSet = __oauth2Parameters[scope];
//alert("Enabling for scope: " + form.getControl("scope").getText()); for (var controlName in enableSet) { setVisible(controlName, true) } }]]></parameter> <parameter name="includeFiles"/> <parameter name="oauth2_password">Passw0rd</parameter> <parameter name="oauth2_token_auth_method">none (public client)</parameter> <parameter name="oauth2_username">itim manager</parameter> <parameter name="path">org</parameter> <parameter name="schema">/openapi</parameter> <parameter name="scope">OAuth2 Password</parameter> <parameter name="title">REST Client Connector</parameter> <parameter name="url">https://192.168.252.3:30943</parameter> </Form> </MetamergeConfig>

Script.name: hook_MultipleEntries
hook_OnNoMatch
Script.parameter: task.logmsg("-- no match found")

Script.name: RESTCLIENT class
SCHEMA class
Script.parameter: true

Script.name: _testFunctions
json_schema

AttributeMapItem.Name: memberships
permissions
schedules
schedules
description
AttributeMapItem.Script: "And now also modified by TDI and getting ready to be deleted"
